name: skills-security-benchmark leaderboard schema
description: Normalized schema for recording benchmark runs across agent-security evaluations.

fields.name: run_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for one benchmark execution run.

fields.name: benchmark_id
fields.description: Identifier from data/benchmark_catalog.json or an extension benchmark.

fields.name: category_id
fields.description: Primary taxonomy bucket used for aggregation.

fields.name: benchmark_split
fields.description: Public, private, dev, test, heldout, or custom split.

fields.name: model_name
fields.description: Base model name.

fields.name: model_provider
fields.description: Provider or organization behind the model.

fields.name: agent_framework
fields.description: Agent framework or runtime used in the evaluation.

fields.name: tool_runtime
fields.description: Tool runtime, MCP host, browser stack, or sandbox implementation.

fields.name: defense_profile
fields.description: Active safety defense, guardrail, or hardening profile.

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Version tag of the benchmark dataset.

fields.name: commit_or_image
fields.description: Git commit, container image, or release tag for reproducibility.

fields.name: run_date
fields.description: Execution date in ISO 8601 format.

fields.name: metric_primary
fields.description: Name of the main reported metric such as ASR, harmful success, or safe completion.

fields.name: score_primary
fields.description: Value of the main metric.

fields.name: metric_secondary
fields.description: Optional secondary metric name.

fields.name: score_secondary
fields.description: Optional secondary metric value.

fields.name: sample_count
fields.description: Number of evaluated samples or episodes.

fields.name: success_direction
fields.description: Interpretation of the primary metric.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Short notes on evaluator settings, exclusions, or caveats.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Link to paper, run log, or reproducibility artifact.
